title: Stussy Betrays CP0
description: On pages 13–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Vegapunk, Kizaru, York, Killer, Koby as CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.
scene: CP0 attacks Egghead, Seraphim enter the conflict, Stussy betrays CP0, Kuma moves toward the Red Line, and Vegapunk’s escape plan collapses.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: G-14 NAVAL Base

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're such a trouble- maker, vice Admiral GARP!

dialogue.speaker: Vegapunk
dialogue.text: We're about to head over to egghead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We can't spare any of our men!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Just...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't be like that, doll! BWA ha ha ha!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: This isn't a joke!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You want to launch an offensive against an Emperor!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Have you cleared this with the top brass?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Why would I?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You've been in the Navy for how many decades with that attitude?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BWA ha ha! It's fine, don't worry about it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Besides, I'm already here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You're what?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Helmetpo!! Get out hereeee!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Is it a pirate attack?! What do they want with Helmetpo?

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Wait! That's vice Admiral Garp's club!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Koby....!! Koby went and got captured by Blackbeard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: And I couldn't do anything to heeelp!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: WAAH!! I really wanted to see you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Quit whimpering! It's hard to watch.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Get on board already!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: We're gonna head to Hachi- NOSU!!

dialogue.speaker: York
dialogue.text: Let's beat the shot outta those pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Killer
dialogue.text: ...and save Captain Roby!

dialogue.speaker: Kizaru
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral GAAARP!!

dialogue.speaker: Koby
dialogue.text: The hero of the Marines, Garp!!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Under Siege through 27 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
